title: Han (disambiguation)
content:
'''Han''' may refer to one of the following: 

==Canon==
*'''[[Han Solo]]''', the [[smuggler]]
**[[Han and Leia's apartment]]
**[[Han's heavy blaster pistol]]
**[[Han Solo's carbonite block]]
**[[Han Solo's dice]]
**[[Han Solo's shipping company]]
**[[Han Solo's hiding place ]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Han Olbeg]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]]
*'''[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]''', the [[smuggler]]
**[[Han Solo's apartment]]
**[[Han's dice]]
*'''[[Han Solo and the Pirates of Kessel]]''', a holothriller that involved Han Solo battling pirates
*'''[[Guun Han Saresh]]''', a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]
*'''[[Pal-Han-Das]]''', a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] noble
*'''[[Sid'Han]]''', a crocodilian predator

==Non-canon==
*'''[[Han Solo (The Star Wars)|Han Solo]]''', as seen in ''[[The Star Wars]]''
*'''[[Han Salad]]''', a type of [[salad]]
*'''[[Han Dardell Thorpe]]''', a cut character from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope]]

==Out of Universe==
===Canon media===
====Books====
*'''''[[Smuggler's Run: A Han Solo & Chewbacca Adventure]]''''' {{C|[[Smuggler's Run: A Han Solo & Chewbacca Adventure (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, a junior novel by [[Greg Rucka]]
*'''''[[Han and the Rebel Rescue]]''''', a young readers adaptation of ''Smuggler's Run: A Han Solo & Chewbacca Adventure'' by [[Disney–Lucasfilm Press]]
*'''''[[Han & Chewie Return!]]''''', a storybook by [[Michael Siglain]]

====Episodes====
*'''''[[Han Solo - Galaxy's Best Smuggler]]''''', the ninth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Han Solo – Taking Flight for his Friends]]''''', the seventeenth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Han Solo vs. the Space Slug - The Escape Artist]]''''', the twenty-second episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Leia and Han - The Han Rescue]]''''', the twenty-fifth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Han Solo - From Smuggler to General]]''''', the thirty-second episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Han and Chewie - A Lifelong Partnership ]]''''', the thirty-sixth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures

====Comics====
*'''''[[Star Wars: Han Solo]]''''' {{C|[[Star Wars: Han Solo (TPB)|TPB]]}}, a [[Marvel Comics]] miniseries by [[Marjorie Liu]]
*'''''[[Star Wars: Han Solo - Imperial Cadet]]''''' {{C|[[Star Wars: Han Solo — Imperial Cadet (TPB)|TPB]]}}, a Marvel Comics miniseries by [[Robbie Thompson]]
*'''''[[Star Wars: Han Solo & Chewbacca]]''''' {{C|[[Star Wars: Han Solo & Chewbacca Vol. 1 — The Crystal Run Part One|Vol 1]]) ([[Star Wars: Han Solo & Chewbacca Vol. 2 — The Crystal Run Part Two|Vol. 2]]}}, a Marvel Comics miniseries by [[Marc Guggenheim]]

===Legends media===
====Novels====
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]''''', a novel trilogy by [[Brian Daley]]
**'''''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]''''', the first volume in the series
***'''[[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|''Han Solo at Stars' End'']]''', comic strip based on the novel
**'''''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]''''', the second volume in the series
**'''''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''''', the third volume in the series
**'''[[The Han Solo Adventures (omnibus)|''The Han Solo Adventures'']]''', a collection of all three volumes
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Trilogy]]''''', a novel trilogy by [[A. C. Crispin]]
**'''''[[The Paradise Snare]]''''' {{C|[[The Paradise Snare (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the first volume in the series
**'''''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''''' {{C|[[The Hutt Gambit (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the second volume in the series
**'''''[[Rebel Dawn]]''''' {{C|[[Rebel Dawn (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the third volume in the series
**'''''[[The Han Solo Trilogy]]''''', a collection of the three volumes

====Young readers====
*'''''[[Han Solo's Rescue Mission]]''''', a children's book by [[John Whitman]]
*'''''[[Han Solo: Rebel Hero]]''''', a children's book by [[Art Ruiz]]
*'''''[[Introducing Han Solo]]''''', a children's book by [[Reed Children's Books]]

====Miscellaneous====
*'''[[Han Solo vs. the Death Star]]''', a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game
*'''''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''''', a roleplaying guide for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]
*'''''[[Han Solo: The Early Years ]]''''', an article by [[Jonathan Wilkins]] published in ''[[Star Wars Insider 106]]
*'''''[[The Han Solo Solution ]]''''', the seventh episode of the [[Star Wars radio drama]]

===People===
*'''[[Bo-Han Wang ]]''', an animator
*'''[[Han Hui Foong]]''', a lighting artist
*'''[[Lu Han]]''', a lighting artist
*'''[[Meng-Han Lee]]''', a lighting artist 
*'''[[Song Han]]''', a special effects artist
*'''[[Yu Han ]]''', an animation rigger
*'''[[E-Han Xiao ]]''', a animation texture Lead
*'''[[I-Han Hsiao]]''', a animation texture lead

===Other===
*'''[[Han shot first]]''', a phrase and fan topic
*'''[[Han Solo and the Princess]]''', a musical theme composed by [[John Williams]]
*'''[[Han and Qi'ra motif]]''', a musical motif by [[John Powell]]
*'''[[Han Solo Commander Expansion]]''', an expansion to ''[[Star Wars: Legion]]''
